query:
INSERT INTO ebooks (title, description, category, coverImageUrl, fileUrl, fileSize, publishedAt, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('An Introduction to Dementia', 'A comprehensive guide for carers and families beginning their journey with dementia care. This ebook covers the basics of understanding dementia, recognising symptoms, and providing compassionate support.', 'Getting Started', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/IGPmxfLoxlovkZBL.png', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/UBrxscMePlakUpTc.pdf', 411380, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
('The Importance of Life Stories', 'Discover how to capture and preserve precious memories through life story work. Learn techniques for recording meaningful conversations and creating lasting legacies for people living with dementia.', 'Life Story Work', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/gBvJHgVGQdvOjenJ.png', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/ojKQIcAkaQsnhcei.pdf', 553492, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
('Accessibility Over Aesthetics', 'Essential guidance on creating dementia-friendly environments that prioritise function and comfort over appearance. Learn practical design principles that enhance quality of life for people with dementia.', 'Care Environment', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/MlEdQdtbEfDpgwfs.png', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663195447750/IyOFaNvXcpzJwQSc.pdf', 417954, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
